name: QA 870
description:
PCP QA Test No. 870

Various checks around the pmlogger control and run files in

$PCP_TMP_DIR/pmlogger and $PCP_RUN_DIR



With a single --check option, is silent except if there is a problem

and runs just the integrity check.  This could be used from check or

check.callback



Copyright (c) 2016 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora40-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 870

Various checks around the pmlogger control and run files in

$PCP_TMP_DIR/pmlogger and $PCP_RUN_DIR

With a single --check option, is silent except if there is a problem

and runs just the integrity check. This could be used from check or

check.callback

Copyright (c) 2016 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py fedora40-container reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 870.out.bad)
2,3c2
< control file check is OK
< run file check is OK
---
> Warning: no pmloggers running
6,9c5,13
< pmlogger: info: found primary symlink -> pid SOMEPID
< pmlogger: ERROR: there is already a primary pmlogger running, pid SOMEPID linkfile=PCP_TMP_DIR/pmlogger/primary
< control file check is OK
< run file check is OK
---
> Arrggh ... pmlogger appears to be running ...
> UID          PID    PPID  C STIME TTY          TIME CMD
> pcp      1187849       1  0 20:29 ?        00:00:00 pmlogger -Dcontext,pmlc -L -c /dev/null -l /var/tmp/870-1187736.log -P /var/tmp/870-1187736.arch
> pcpqa    1188061 1187736  0 20:29 ?        00:00:00 grep -E PID|1187849
> kill off the primary pmlogger we just started ...
> pmlogger: info: created control file symlink PCP_TMP_DIR/pmlogger/primary -> PCP_TMP_DIR/pmlogger/1187849
> pmlogger: info: removed old-style hardlink to stale socket '/run/pcp/pmlogger.primary.socket': No such file or directory
> pmlogger: info: created primary pmlogger socket symlink /run/pcp/pmlogger.primary.socket -> /run/pcp/pmlogger.1187849.socket
> Warning: no pmloggers running
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
Primary pmlogger not running ...
chkconfig pmlogger on, and restart PMCD
Job for pmlogger.service failed because the service did not take the steps required by its unit configuration.
See "systemctl status pmlogger.service" and "journalctl -xeu pmlogger.service" for details.
